chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr.B.A.No. S – 872 of 2023. 1.For orders on MA 812/2024. 2.For orders on MA 345/2024. 3.For hearing of bail application. Date of Hearing 19th January, 2024. Mr.Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo Advocate alongwith applicants. - 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through the instant bail application, applicants Gul Mir, Abid Ali and Ali Murad seek Pre-arrest bail in respect of Crime No.213/2023 of Police Site Area, Sukkur, registered for offence u/s 457, 324, 427, 147, 148, 504, 506/2, PPC. Learned counsel contends that the applicants are innocent and have falsely been implicated in the case as they have nothing to do with the alleged offence with which they are charged. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are admitted to ad-interim pre-arrest bail, subject to furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rs.Fifty Thousand) each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Issue notice to learned Addl.P.G as well as complainant. To come-up for confirmation or otherwise on 30.01.2024. JUDGE Akber.
